title: rubus × declinatus
intro: Rubus × declinatus is a hybrid plant species, resulting from the cross between the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the fragrant raspberry (Rubus fruticosus), and is commonly known as the wild raspberry or bramble. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of anthocyanins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Rubus × declinatus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential antimicrobial and antiviral activities. Rubus × declinatus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
